diffCoverage.notes: Three layers touched (types + zalo + command). Verified forward-only direction and that zca-rust event types are mapped to the DTO inside zalo.

findings.evidence: to_incoming_message maps zca-rust Message into types::IncomingMessage inside the zalo layer; command depends on zalo + types; types/events depends only on types/account. No back-edges, so the forward-only order types -> ... -> zalo -> ... -> command holds.
findings.fix: Keep ListenerEvent mapping in zalo as more event kinds (typing/seen/reactions) are surfaced.

summary: Cross-layer change (types + zalo + command) reviewed for layering. The new IncomingMessage DTO lives in types; zca-rust ListenerEvent is mapped to it inside zalo; command consumes only core types and emits the DTO. Forward-only DAG preserved, zca-rust confined to zalo. Approve.
